calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To California Business Professions Code Section 6201 A And Rule 3 501 C Of The Rules Of The State Bar Of California
Off Calendar Sep-27-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PAULA THOMAS, AN INDIVIDUAL Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To California Business Professions Code Section 6201 A And Rule 3 501 C Of The Rules Of The State Bar Of California

Off calendar as moot. The complaint was dismissed on September 15, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2022 Continued To Feb-01-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Relief Of Waiver Of Objections Re Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents; Declaration Of Stephen A. Silverman In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-02-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Dimitrios P. Biller, Esq. (310.633.0081; biller_ldtconsulting@verizon.net) of LDT Consulting, Inc. for Plaintiffs.
Brent Parker, Esq. (310.648.8187; parker@cbparkerlaw.com) of Silverman & Milligan LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PAULA THOMAS' Motion For Relief Of Waiver Of Objections Re Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents is GRANTED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
